sn22.25:1.2: “Monks, abandon any desire & passion for form.
sn22.25:1.3: Thus that form will be abandoned, its root destroyed, made like a palmyra stump, deprived of the conditions of development, not destined for future arising.
sn22.25:1.4: Abandon any desire & passion for feeling…
sn22.25:1.6: Abandon any desire & passion for perception…
sn22.25:1.8: Abandon any desire & passion for fabrications…
sn22.25:1.10: Abandon any desire & passion for consciousness.
sn22.25:1.11: Thus that consciousness will be abandoned, its root destroyed, made like a palmyra stump, deprived of the conditions of development, not destined for future arising.”
